message:
✨ Add Netlify Function for live nightly E2E data on console.kubestellar.io (#1142)

Port the Go backend nightly E2E handler to a Netlify Function so the
Nightly E2E Status card serves live GitHub Actions data on the Netlify-
hosted site instead of demo data.

- Create web/netlify/functions/nightly-e2e.mts with full port of
  pkg/api/handlers/nightly_e2e.go logic (17 workflows, GPU failure
  classification, pass rate/trend computation)
- Use @netlify/blobs for server-side caching (5min idle, 2min active)
- GITHUB_TOKEN accessed via process.env (Netlify dashboard runtime
  env var only — never in source code or build output)
- Add redirects in netlify.toml for both /api/nightly-e2e/runs and
  /api/public/nightly-e2e/runs endpoints
- Zero frontend changes needed — existing useNightlyE2EData hook
  already tries these endpoints before falling back to demo data

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,6 +17,18 @@
   VITE_DEMO_MODE = "true"
   NODE_VERSION = "20"
 
+# Nightly E2E status API — proxy to Netlify Function
+# Serves live GitHub Actions data (GITHUB_TOKEN set in Netlify dashboard)
+[[redirects]]
+  from = "/api/nightly-e2e/runs"
+  to = "/.netlify/functions/nightly-e2e"
+  status = 200
+
+[[redirects]]
+  from = "/api/public/nightly-e2e/runs"
+  to = "/.netlify/functions/nightly-e2e"
+  status = 200
+
 # Presence tracking API — proxy to Netlify Function
 [[redirects]]
   from = "/api/active-users"
